message:
fix: enable OpenSSF Scorecard publishing to securityscorecards.dev (#5543)

The reusable workflow from kubestellar/infra had publish_results:
false, so the scorecard ran but never published to the OpenSSF API.
The securityscorecards.dev website showed "report not found".

Replaced with direct ossf/scorecard-action with publish_results:
true so results appear on the website and the README badge works.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -15,5 +15,22 @@ permissions:
 
 jobs:
   analysis:
-    uses: kubestellar/infra/.github/workflows/reusable-scorecard.yml@main
-    secrets: inherit
+    name: Scorecard analysis
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          persist-credentials: false
+
+      - name: Run Scorecard
+        uses: ossf/scorecard-action@v2.4.0
+        with:
+          results_file: results.sarif
+          results_format: sarif
+          publish_results: true
+
+      - name: Upload SARIF
+        uses: github/codeql-action/upload-sarif@v3
+        with:
+          sarif_file: results.sarif
